channel.title: my_thoughts
channel.description: My thoughts and streams of consciousness organized into barely coherent posts about things

item.title: 💭 Normal boyhood is ADHD
item.description: I may want to write a longer post about this or just capture some quick thoughts but I appreciate DHH's take here.... AD
item.author: Nic Payne

item.title: 💭 "We would be less confidential than Google" – Proton threatens...

item.author: Nic Payne

item.author: Nic Payne

item.author: Nic Payne

item.author: Nic Payne

item.title: Thoughts

item.author: Nic Payne

item.author: Nic Payne
